# Switch

A toggle switch component with an optional label. Wraps the Chakra UI Switch compound component into a single convenient API.

## Import

```jsx
import { Switch } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `checked` | `boolean` | - | Controlled checked state |
| `defaultChecked` | `boolean` | - | Initial checked state for uncontrolled usage |
| `onCheckedChange` | `(details: { checked: boolean }) => void` | - | Callback fired when the checked state changes |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the switch |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | `"primary"` | The color palette for the switch |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the switch is disabled |
| `label` | `string` | - | Label text displayed next to the switch |
| `children` | `ReactNode` | - | Alternative to `label` for custom label content |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Switch label="Enable notifications" />
```

### Controlled

```jsx
const [enabled, setEnabled] = useState(false);

<Switch
  checked={enabled}
  onCheckedChange={(e) => setEnabled(e.checked)}
  label="Dark mode"
/>
```

### Sizes

```jsx
<Switch size="xs" label="Extra small" />
<Switch size="sm" label="Small" />
<Switch size="md" label="Medium" />
<Switch size="lg" label="Large" />
```

### With custom color

```jsx
<Switch colorPalette="green" label="Active" />
```

### Disabled

```jsx
<Switch disabled label="Cannot toggle" />
```

## Features

- Renders a complete switch with hidden input, control track, and thumb
- Optional label via `label` prop or `children`
- Configurable color palette for themed switches
- Supports all standard switch sizes
- Forwards refs to the root element
